title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 1 of 2007
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART I1I SECTION 4 OF GAZETTE OF INDIA GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICUL I URAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY IMPHAL NIAMPUR ORDINANC E Imphal dated the 17th December, 2007 No. 1 of 2007 No. CAUIReg/584/Ord/05. - Whereas the approved Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultural University Scheme under the VIII Five Year Plan as communicated by the Joint Secretary, Department 6r Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary, Indian Council of Agricultural Res fearthe ch • vide their letter number 1(2)/92-PI and M (Part-III) dated 13th October, 1993 provides or establishment of College of Veterinary Sciences (Mizoram), College of Horticulture and Forestry (Arunachal Pradesh), College of Fisheries (Tripura), College of Agricultural Engineering end Post Harvest Technology (Sikkim), College of Home Science and College of Post Graduate Studies (Meghalaya). . Whereas, the aforesaid sanction also provides for creation and the filling up of both academic and non-academic/supporting staff as provided therein to run the university and its constituent colleges with the necessary modifications considered necessary by the Central Agricultural University. Whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance for the establishment o ft College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology in Sikkim as a constituent lege of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal vide letter No. 5-8/2005-Central Agricultural University dated 11.11.2005. Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by the sub-section 2 of section 27 of Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992). the Board of Management has already approved the amendment in Ordinance No. 2 of 2005. And whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education • has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance for making amendments in -vy.1\MN .1/4 ()piker.
